creator: ak@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186375
Update after r323342

- Rebase after r323342
- General code modernization
- Add 9 to recognized man sections
- Change check order to prevent situation when symlink moved as hardlinks
- Remove .so inlining: mdocml understand it just fine; there is no .so in the base manual tree anyways
- Also uncompress bz2|xz|Z compressed manpages 
- Use gzip -l instead of file to speedup (un)compression process
